patterns.name: Daily Triage
patterns.summary: Cluster new issues, identify likely owners, and prepare a reviewable triage report.

patterns.name: PR Babysitter
patterns.summary: Watch pull requests for failing checks, reviewer comments, and merge readiness.

patterns.name: Dependency Sweeper
patterns.summary: Batch dependency updates into small, testable changes with rollback notes.

patterns.name: Post-Merge Cleanup
patterns.summary: Remove temporary scaffolding, update docs, and check release notes after merge.
